_comment: Singapore events relevant to Heritage Collection (3.5-star shophouse aparthotel, CBD/cultural districts, no children). Demand scoring rules: (1) check past materialization - did similar events actually fill rooms before? (2) attendee count AND type - international adult business/leisure travellers staying overnight score high; day-attendees, locals, and family crowds score low. Edit/extend this file as events are confirmed.

events.name: Singapore International Jewellery Expo
events.attendees: ~15,000, trade + retail buyers, mostly regional day-attendees
events.rationale: Past editions did not materialize into occupancy lift for 3.5-star CBD stock (confirmed in own July data). Day-attendee heavy.

events.name: Sigep Asia (Gelato, Pastry & Coffee)
events.rationale: Trade F&B show; some overnight international exhibitors on budget - fits 3.5-star, but modest volume. Watch pickup before raising.

events.name: SDF 2026 — Singapore Data Festival
events.venue: Sands Expo & Convention Centre, Marina Bay Sands (L3-4)
events.attendees: 2,000+ data/AI leaders and professionals, regional + international, first edition
events.rationale: Right attendee type (working adults, multi-day, many overnighting near CBD) and week-long format, but modest volume and no past materialization to lean on (first edition). Hold ladder rates; lift only if own pickup confirms compression.

events.name: National Day weekend
events.rationale: Staycation demand is real but family-skewed (we don't cater to children) and concentrated in view hotels. Shophouse CBD gets spillover only. Raise modestly if own pickup confirms.

events.name: The Business Show Asia
events.rationale: SME crowd is price-conscious - good fit for 3.5-star CBD shophouse near MBS. Check materialization vs past business shows.

events.name: Seafood Expo Asia
events.rationale: International trade adults staying multiple nights; mid-tier accommodation typical for exhibitor staff.

events.name: Medical Fair Asia + Medical Manufacturing Asia + OS+H Asia (co-located)
events.attendees: Asia's largest medical equipment show; tens of thousands, international trade adults
events.rationale: Large co-located trade cluster = strong overnight demand across price tiers near CBD. Historically materializes. Hold rates high; only cut if own occupancy lags <85% inside 7 days.

events.name: MRO Asia Pacific
events.rationale: Venue is far east side - attendees cluster near Changi/Expo, weak driver for CBD shophouse stock.

events.name: F1 Singapore Grand Prix (night race, first Sprint format)
events.attendees: 250,000+ over 3 days, international adult leisure/corporate, high spend
events.rationale: Strongest annual demand driver for CBD; consistently materializes city-wide. Adults-only skew fits us perfectly; walking distance from Quays/CBD properties. Price aggressively above IA rate; floors irrelevant. Watch race-week compression from early September.

events.name: ITB Asia + MICE Show Asia + Travel Tech Asia
events.rationale: Travel trade stays overnight, many mid-budget; strong fit and past materialization for CBD 3.5-star.
